# Design: `app-foundation` — Domain-Free Golden Starter Template

**Date:** 2026-06-08
**Status:** Awaiting user approval
**Source of truth for the seam:** `.starter-planning/seam-report.md` (generated by an 8-agent read-only mapping of `~/sally`)

---

## 1. Goal

Produce a **domain-free "golden starter" repository** — a faithful clone of the Sally
monorepo's entire platform, infrastructure, security, AI, and cross-cutting foundation,
with **all trucking/rest-optimization domain code removed**, so a new app can be built on
top immediately without rebuilding auth, multi-tenancy, billing, AI, infra, or CI.

It is delivered as a **GitHub template repo** (`app-foundation`) and can later be graduated
into a `create-app` generator. The design and implementation plan are themselves
**replicable artifacts** — re-runnable to regenerate or evolve the starter.

### Non-goals
- Not a generator (yet) — that's a follow-on once the golden repo is proven.
- Not a Zod v4 migration — the starter matches Sally on **Zod v3** (`^3.24.2`).
- No trucking domain, no domain seed data, no Sally branding or naming anywhere.

---

## 2. Locked decisions

| Decision | Choice |
|---|---|
| Deliverable | Golden **template repo** (generator later) |
| Tenancy | **One repo, tenancy = config toggle** (`MULTI_TENANT` env) |
| Stack scope | **Full platform clone minus domain** (keep Stripe, Inngest/BullMQ, LiveKit voice, Firebase, S3, email/SMS/push, Langfuse, Desk engine, AI chat + empty MCP) |
| Zod | **v3** (match Sally; v4 is future work) |
| Desk + Voice | **Keep both**, gutted-but-wired (empty registries as extension points) |
| Registration/onboarding | **Kept, gated behind `MULTI_TENANT` flag** |
| Repo name | `app-foundation` |
| Package scope | `@app/*` (replaces `@sally/*`) |
| Delivery order | **Multi-tenant target first**, then single-tenant config |
| Process | Plan-driven (brainstorm → spec → implementation plan → execute) |

---

## 3. The seam (executive summary)

Sally is already built DDD-style with a hard platform/domain boundary, so the separation is
clean:

- **KEEP verbatim (~70% of backend infra):** `auth/`, `config/`, `infrastructure/*`,
  `shared/*`, `health/`, `dev/`, the AI/agent/MCP/Desk skeletons, billing (Stripe), the
  integrations *framework*, admin consoles, terraform/observability IaC, the
  shared-types + Zod codegen pattern, architecture fitness tests, docker dev stack, CI/CD.
- **KEEP-BUT-GENERICIZE (~20%):** files that carry one of three coupling forms —
  (a) **enum/constant catalogs** that enumerate trucking concepts (`UserRole`,
  `NotificationType`, `EVENT_REGISTRY`, `QUEUE_NAMES`, `DOMAIN_TO_SSE`, scope vocab, cache
  namespaces); (b) **branding strings** (`SALLY`, `sally-*` cookies/buckets/packages, plan
  tier names); (c) **domain joins/FKs** (`.include({ driver, customer })`, `driverId`,
  `loadId`) bolted onto generic auth/user/conversation shapes.
- **STRIP (delete whole trees):** `domains/{fleet,routing,financials,operations,analytics,home}`,
  domain Prisma models, domain web features/routes, domain seeds, domain MCP tools/agents/prompts.

**Critical finding:** multi-tenancy is **convention-based** — a global guard chain
(`Throttler → Jwt → Tenant → Roles → Plan`) guarantees a tenant is present, and every query
manually filters `where: { tenantId }`. **There is no Prisma middleware.** This means
single-tenant mode is a **pure guard/strategy short-circuit + one seeded implicit tenant —
zero query rewrites.** This is the ideal outcome for the config-toggle requirement.

---

## 4. Target repo structure

```
app-foundation/
├── apps/
│   ├── backend/                        # NestJS 11 + Prisma 7 + Postgres
│   │   ├── prisma/
│   │   │   ├── schema.prisma            # ~35 platform models, genericized enums
│   │   │   ├── migrations/0_init/       # ONE fresh migration (not Sally's 276-file history)
│   │   │   └── seeds/                   # super-admin, feature-flags, plans, vendor-configs,
│   │   │                                #   add-ons, desk(gutted), model-pricing
│   │   ├── scripts/generate-shared-enums.ts   # prisma-enum → zod codegen (PATTERN kept)
│   │   └── src/
│   │       ├── main.ts  app.module.ts  worker.ts
│   │       ├── auth/  config/  constants/  health/  dev/
│   │       ├── infrastructure/          # cache, database, events, logging, notification,
│   │       │                            #   outbound-webhooks, push, queue, retry, sms, sse,
│   │       │                            #   storage(S3), telemetry(OTel+Langfuse), sync
│   │       ├── shared/  architecture/
│   │       └── domains/
│   │           ├── platform/            # entitlements, tenants, users, invitations,
│   │           │                        #   settings, oauth-provider, api-keys, feedback, announcements
│   │           ├── billing/             # Stripe subscriptions + wallet + dunning (KEEP whole)
│   │           ├── integrations/        # framework only, EMPTY vendor catalog
│   │           ├── notifications/       # re-homed from operations/ (multi-channel dispatcher)
│   │           ├── support/             # re-homed from operations/ (ticketing)
│   │           ├── admin/               # super-admin infra console
│   │           ├── ai/                  # chat + agent runtime + EMPTY mcp + mcp-server + KB + RLS + voice(gutted)
│   │           ├── desk/                # Inngest workflow engine, EMPTY responsibility registry
│   │           └── prompting/           # prompt mgmt engine, one generic assistant fallback
│   └── web/                             # Next.js 15 App Router
│       └── src/
│           ├── app/                     # login, forgot/reset-password, oauth/consent,
│           │                            #   maintenance, settings shell, registration (MT-gated)
│           ├── features/
│           │   ├── auth/
│           │   └── platform/            # ai(chat), settings, users, admin, onboarding, tour,
│           │                            #   plans, billing, feature-flags, api-keys, oauth-clients, webhooks
│           └── shared/                  # ui/, layout/, lib/, realtime/(SSE), command-palette/
├── packages/
│   ├── ui/                              # @app/ui — shadcn/Radix primitives, tailwind preset
│   ├── shared-types/                    # @app/shared-types — platform Zod schemas + codegen
│   └── test-utils/                      # @app/test-utils — auth fixtures, playwright client
├── infra/
│   ├── terraform/                       # VPC/ECS/ALB/RDS/Redis/S3/IAM/CloudWatch/Scheduler/Doppler
│   ├── bootstrap/                       # state-bucket bootstrap (NO committed tfstate)
│   └── observability/                   # Loki + Tempo + Grafana
├── tools/                              # db migrate/tunnel, dev install/kill-port/launcher
├── tests/                             # @app/qa — Playwright runner + smoke/security-headers
├── docker-compose.yml                 # pgvector/pg16 + redis:7 + observability + inngest
├── turbo.json  pnpm-workspace.yaml  package.json  .github/workflows/  .husky/  CLAUDE.md
```

---

## 5. Tenancy as a config toggle

A single env flag drives both apps; **multi-tenant is the default build, single-tenant is a flip.**

### Backend (`MULTI_TENANT`, default `true`; `IMPLICIT_TENANT_ID` for ST)
Using the **default-tenant-row pattern** (one seeded `Tenant` row), not nullable-everywhere
(which would weaken every `@@unique([tenantId, ...])`):

- `auth/guards/tenant.guard.ts` — if MT disabled, stamp `request.tenantId = implicitTenantId`
  and return `true` instead of throwing on missing tenant claim.
- `auth/strategies/jwt.strategy.ts` — if MT disabled, stop requiring/loading the tenant
  relation; stamp the implicit tenant onto `request.user` so downstream `where:{tenantId}`
  resolves to the one tenant.
- Seed exactly one `Tenant` row at bootstrap → all manual tenant-scoped queries work unchanged.
- `plan.guard.ts` — implicit tenant defaults to top tier so entitlement checks pass.
- Disable only the **registration flow that creates new Tenants** (the rest is identical).

### Frontend (`NEXT_PUBLIC_MULTI_TENANT` + `isMultiTenant()` helper)
- `shared/lib/tenant-url.ts` — `extractSubdomain()`→null, `getCookieDomain()`→undefined.
- `middleware.ts` — skip subdomain extraction + `x-tenant-slug` header + subdomain redirect.
- `login/page.tsx` + `login-form.tsx` — skip `/tenants/branding/${slug}` fetch, render generic branding.
- Registration/onboarding routes hidden when `MULTI_TENANT=false`.

**Net:** zero query rewrites; both modes ship from one codebase.

---

## 6. Generic AI + empty MCP (kept fully working)

- **Working streaming chat** end-to-end: `domains/ai/sally-ai/*` (renamed to neutral) →
  Mastra + Memory(PostgresStore) + Langfuse + **one generic `assistant` agent** + Anthropic
  via AI SDK. Endpoint `@Controller('conversations')`; custom SSE protocol
  (`0:`text / `8:`card / `9:`HITL-suspend / `a:`followups); HITL resume. Frontend chat UI at
  `features/platform/ai/` with a **pluggable card registry** (catalog emptied).
- **Empty-but-extensible MCP** — `domains/ai/mcp/mcp-tools.module.ts` is THE extension point:
  keep `McpModule.forRoot(...)` + `McpToolService` + a single sample `HealthTool`
  (re-scoped `platform:read`); empty `imports[]`/`providers[]` with a
  `// register your @Tool providers here` comment. The external MCP server
  (`domains/ai/mcp-server/*`, OAuth + API-key) is kept unchanged and returns `[]` tools.
- **Desk** workflow engine kept with an **empty `RESPONSIBILITY_REGISTRY`** (Inngest `/inngest`
  serve handler wired, zero responsibilities). **Voice** (LiveKit) kept gutted/wired.

---

## 7. Prisma starter schema

- **~35 platform models kept** (Tenant, User, RefreshToken, LoginEvent, ApiKey, FeatureFlag,
  Notification, PushSubscription, Conversation/Message, KnowledgeDocument, AiInvocation/
  ModelPricing/TenantAiBudget, AgentInvocationLog, HitlChallenge, OAuth* set, Webhook*,
  DomainEventLog, DeadLetterLog, Job/JobSchedule, TenantCounter, billing primitives,
  PlanConfig/Entitlement, AddOn set, Integration framework, Support, Feedback, Announcement,
  Document, Desk set gutted).
- **Severed relations** (compile-blocking — must remove or `prisma validate` fails):
  drop trucking fields/relations from Tenant (dotNumber, mcNumber, fleetSize, ~40 relation
  arrays), User (driver/customer + back-relations), Conversation (driverId),
  ConversationMessage (loadId), UserInvitation (driverId/customerId), Document
  (moneyCode/driverActionRequest). Genericize `UserRole` (→ OWNER/ADMIN/MEMBER/SUPER_ADMIN),
  `NotificationType`, `AiSurface`, `IntegrationType/Vendor`.
- **Migration strategy:** ship **one fresh `0_init`** migration from the pruned schema (not
  the 276-file history). Hand-add raw SQL for kept `Unsupported(...)` columns:
  `CREATE EXTENSION vector;`, KnowledgeDocument `embedding vector(1536)` + `content_tsv`
  GIN/ivfflat indexes (+ DeskMemory embedding). Preserve dual-ID convention (Int autoincrement
  + string business key for entities; UUIDv7 for audit/event/log tables).
- **Seeds kept:** super-admin (generic email), feature-flags (generic rows), plan-config +
  entitlements (neutral tier names), vendor-configs (trimmed), add-ons (generic),
  desk (gutted), model-pricing. Domain seeds dropped.

---

## 8. shared-types + Zod codegen pattern (preserved, domain-free)

Carry the **mechanism**, not the domain payload:
- `z.object` + co-located `z.infer`, **camelCase fields**, barrel-exported as `@app/shared-types`.
- **Enums: single source = Prisma.** `generate-shared-enums.ts` regex-parses `enum X {}` blocks →
  emits `generated/prisma-enums.ts` (schema + type + value-bag triple), chained into
  `prisma:generate`, guarded by `enum-codegen-parity.spec.ts`.
- Keep `src/platform/*`, pagination/format/time utils, infra envelopes (job/sse/webhook), AI
  schemas (spend/telemetry/capability/model-alias/agent-scopes with regenerated vocab).
- **Drop** generated `prisma-enums.ts` (regenerates) and all domain schema folders.
- **Zod stays v3** to match Sally.

---

## 9. Naming & parameterization

- **`@sally/*` → `@app/*`** across all `package.json`, imports, turbo filters, CI `--filter`.
- Rename: `SallyInsight`→`Insight`, `SALLY_EVENTS`→`DOMAIN_EVENTS`, `sally-auth`/`sally-role`
  cookies, `sally:*` cache namespaces, `SallyCacheService`, `sally-ai` folder, Swagger title.
- **Terraform/infra:** `var.project` default `sally`→`app`; templatize hardcoded
  `sally-terraform-state` bucket (TF backend can't use vars → `__PROJECT__` token or
  `-backend-config`), ECR repos, CloudWatch log groups, RDS username/secret names, IAM ARNs,
  Grafana datasource file, docker container/network names, CI default URLs + `ECR_REPOSITORY`.
- **CLAUDE.md:** keep generic conventions (camelCase, enum-codegen, UI standards, Doppler,
  branching); strip "What is SALLY", the domain table, `@appshore.in` emails, Obsidian workflow.

### Secrets that must NOT ship (hard gate)
`infra/bootstrap/terraform.tfstate`, `infra/bootstrap/.terraform/`, `tools/docs/login-cred*.md`,
`tools/docs/appshore-in-dns.txt`, all `.env` files (only `.env.example` ships),
`firebase-admin-sdk.json`.

---

## 10. Build approach (how, not the detailed plan)

This is a **clone-then-surgically-strip** operation, not a from-scratch rebuild — that's what
guarantees "exact same folder structure and patterns." High-level phases (the implementation
plan will break these into reviewable steps):

1. **Scaffold the repo** — copy Sally's tree into `~/code/app-foundation`, drop `.git`,
   `node_modules`, build artifacts, all secrets/`.env`, the 276 migrations, and the whole
   domain trees identified in the STRIP inventory. `git init` fresh.
2. **Rename pass** — `@sally/*`→`@app/*`, branding strings, cookies, namespaces, Swagger,
   infra tokens (mechanical, scripted, verified by grep-for-`sally`).
3. **Prisma reduction** — prune schema to the ~35 platform models, sever domain relations,
   genericize enums, author one `0_init` migration with the raw-SQL extras, slim seeds.
4. **Backend genericize** — strip enum/constant catalogs and domain joins per the
   KEEP-BUT-GENERICIZE table; empty the MCP toolset, Desk registry, integrations/vendor
   registry, agent roster (→ one generic assistant); re-home notifications/ + support/.
5. **Add tenancy toggle** — `MULTI_TENANT` config + guard/strategy short-circuits + implicit
   tenant seed (backend); `isMultiTenant()` + middleware/login/url short-circuits (frontend).
6. **Web genericize** — strip domain features/routes, genericize navigation/command-palette/
   realtime invalidation maps, neutralize branding/metadata/manifest, keep the AI chat shell.
7. **Regenerate derived artifacts** — `prisma generate` + `generate-shared-enums`, regenerate
   the genericized architecture fitness tests, rbac matrix, status DTOs.
8. **Verify multi-tenant target** — `pnpm install`, type-check, lint, build all; `docker compose up`
   (postgres+redis); `prisma migrate`; seed; boot backend + web; log in; send an AI chat message;
   confirm MCP server returns `[]`. Fix until green.
9. **Push to GitHub** as `app-foundation`, mark as template repo.
10. **Single-tenant verification** — boot the same code with `MULTI_TENANT=false`, confirm
    implicit-tenant login + chat work and tenant UI is hidden. Document both run modes in README.

### Verification gates (evidence before "done")
- `pnpm type-check && pnpm lint && pnpm build` all pass.
- `grep -ri sally` returns only intentional/zero references.
- Backend boots, `/health` green, login issues a JWT, AI chat streams a reply, MCP `tools/list` = `[]`.
- Web boots, login works, chat UI renders and streams.
- Both `MULTI_TENANT=true` and `MULTI_TENANT=false` verified.
- No secret files present (`git status` + explicit secret-path check).

---

## 11. Risks & mitigations

| Risk | Mitigation |
|---|---|
| Severed Prisma relations cascade into many compile errors | Do schema reduction early (phase 3) and fix all references before later phases; `prisma validate` as a gate. |
| Domain imports linger in genericized files and break the build | grep-driven cleanup; the architecture fitness tests + type-check catch stragglers. |
| Emptying MCP/Desk/agents breaks the AI turn pipeline (fail-closed on unknown tools) | Empty toolset + Desk registry + agent roster **together**; keep one sample tool + one generic agent so the pipeline has something valid. |
| Voice (LiveKit) adds heavy deps for a gutted shell | Kept wired but inert; no keys required to boot (text chat is the default surface). |
| Accidentally shipping secrets | Hard-gated secret-path checklist before first commit; `.gitignore` audited. |
| "Exact same patterns" drift | Clone-and-strip (not rewrite) preserves structure by construction. |

---

## 12. Deliverables

1. `~/code/app-foundation` — running, domain-free monorepo, multi-tenant by default,
   single-tenant via `MULTI_TENANT=false`.
2. Pushed to GitHub under the user's account as a **template repo**.
3. README documenting both run modes + the "drop your domain here" extension points
   (`domains/`, MCP `providers[]`, Desk registry, integrations vendor registry).
4. This spec + the implementation plan committed under `docs/superpowers/specs/` — the
   replicable artifacts.
